name: Special Thai Chicken with Chillies (Mild)
recipeIngredient: 4 Fresh Red Chillies, seeded and sliced
2 teaspoons Brown sugar (or jaggery if available)
1/2 cup Straw mushrooms (or tinned mushrooms if desperate)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok, add chillies and garlic, and fry until crisp and golden. Drain onto paper towels, leaving the oil in the wok.
2. Add chicken and onion to the hot oil and stir-fry until the chicken is cooked through.
3. Stir in lime juice and vegetables (straw mushrooms and bamboo shoots), cooking for about 2 minutes.
4. Mix in tamarind sauce, fish sauce, oyster sauce, and brown sugar, stirring until well combined.
5. Serve over rice or noodles, garnished with coriander leaves.
